summary: Acceptance trace for project filesystem restructure and dogfood boundary clarification.

acceptance.criterion: Pi extension entry resolves from src/index.ts and package manifest/files no longer require extensions/codewiki.
Only skills/codewiki/SKILL.md is a public CodeWiki skill; loop/playbook instructions live under that skill as supporting markdown.
Project Pi system prompt appends a clear .codewiki dogfood-state-not-source-code boundary.
Roadmap queue lives under .codewiki/roadmap/queue.json instead of root .codewiki/roadmap.json.
Source tree uses domain/application/adapters as top-level layers and removes the confusing infrastructure layer.
